scenarios.name: baseline-idle
scenarios.description: Spike-T4 parity: serialized exact-K on an idle node.
observations: evm_mine latency: p50 10.7ms, p99 23.3ms over 60 calls

scenarios.name: negative-control-ratelimit
scenarios.description: Forces the swallowed-failure mode (submission rate limiter) to prove the per-call height oracle detects silent +0 mines. PASSES when +0 calls are observed.

scenarios.name: load-serial-refresh-off
scenarios.description: Serialized exact-K under steady tx load, updateWorkOnNewTransaction=false.
observations: load: accepted 3603/3619 txs, mean pending-before-mine 19.8, 251/251 blocks non-empty
evm_mine latency: p50 10.1ms, p99 29.2ms over 250 calls

scenarios.name: load-serial-refresh-on
scenarios.description: Serialized exact-K under steady tx load with updateWorkOnNewTransaction=true — every accepted tx rebuilds currentWork on the async EventDispatchThread.
observations: load: accepted 3374/3388 txs, mean pending-before-mine 18.5, 251/251 blocks non-empty
evm_mine latency: p50 10.4ms, p99 33.0ms over 250 calls

scenarios.name: load-rapidfire-refresh-on
scenarios.description: Zero inter-call delay + max flood: densest interleaving of work rebuilds with the buildBlockToMine -> getWork -> submit window.
observations: load: accepted 1655/1661 txs, mean pending-before-mine 4.3, 301/301 blocks non-empty
evm_mine latency: p50 13.2ms, p99 32.8ms over 300 calls

scenarios.name: soak-refresh-tick
scenarios.description: Soak past the hardcoded 60s RefreshBlock timer (2+ ticks) with a non-empty txpool, updateWorkOnNewTransaction=true.
observations: soak covered 150s (99 mines) — >=2 RefreshBlock ticks interleaved
load: accepted 15051/15616 txs, mean pending-before-mine 333.7, 100/100 blocks non-empty
evm_mine latency: p50 13.9ms, p99 53.0ms over 99 calls

scenarios.name: concurrent-callers
scenarios.description: Parallel evm_mine callers (no load). Static analysis predicts exact-K violations (shared MinerClientImpl.work field) — this scenario captures the reproducer.
observations: concurrent rounds: 40, calls 170, blocks lost 130 (40 rounds violated exact-K)
uncles observed: 130 — sibling blocks were produced

scenarios.name: concurrent-callers-load
scenarios.description: Parallel evm_mine callers with tx load and updateWorkOnNewTransaction=true.
observations: concurrent rounds: 15, calls 60, blocks lost 45 (15 rounds violated exact-K)
uncles observed: 45 — sibling blocks were produced
